attributes.description: CSB Bank (formerly The Catholic Syrian Bank Ltd) is engaged in the business of banking Services ,oldest private sector banks in India with a history of over 98 years, and a strong base in Kerala , Bank focus on SME, retail, and NRI customers.(Source : Company Web-site )
